name: Obby: Swimming competition
description: Welcome to the world of Obby: The Swimming Competition! Here its up to you to swim as far away as possible by buying boats and ships, unlocking new air trails and collecting energy! Buy cool swimming aids, collect energy and pets that will give you bonuses! Explore different locations, but remember - you need rebirth points to open them! Game Features: - Manage boats and buy new models! - Farm swim points to buy new watercraft and air trails. - A variety of air trails with unique effects. - Rebirth system - unlock new locations and become stronger. - Leaderboards and competitions - compete with other swimmers and bec
instructions: PC bull Movement ndash W A S D bull Jump ndash Spacebar Mobile Device bull Movement ndash Virtual joystick Enjoy Collect speed take water transport and earn victories
